basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant, Scientist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Medical), Scientist C (Non Medical), Administrative Assistant
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Consultant (Medical), Scientist C (Non Medical), Administrative Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Consultant (Medical), Scientist C (Non Medical), and Administrative Assistant.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned. Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years and OBC up to 3 years for all categories. Physically Handicapped up to 10 Years and 15 Years for SC/ST and 13 Years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/BDS/MPH, MD (Community Medicine), Post Graduate Degree, Master's degree
qualification.details: Consultant (Medical) (18 months): MBBS/BDS/MPH with at least 3 years experience OR Professionals with MD (Community Medicine). Desirable: work experience in health systems at state/central level. Scientist C (Non Medical) equivalent to Project Research Scientist-II (Non Med) (16 months): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees, with three years post qualification experience or PhD. Administrative Assistant (15 months): Master in any discipline from a recognized university. Desirable: MBA/PGDM from a recognized university, knowledge of computer and having experience in handling national and international programmes.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Scientist C (Non Medical) equivalent to Project Research Scientist-II (Non Med) (16 months)

salary_details.details: Consultant (Medical) (18 months): Rs.1,80,000.00 Scientist C (Non Medical) equivalent to Project Research Scientist-II (Non Med) (16 months): Rs.87,100.00 (Rs.67000/- + 30% HRA) Administrative Assistant (15 months): Rs.45,000.00

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment is 27th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Consultant (Medical), Scientist C (Non Medical), and Administrative Assistant posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these AIIMS Delhi posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these AIIMS Delhi posts is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (Medical) post, candidates need an MBBS/BDS/MPH with at least 3 years of experience or an MD in Community Medicine. Experience in health systems is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Administrative Assistant position offers a salary of Rs. 45,000.00 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for applying to AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual. The duration for each post is mentioned in the vacancy details.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from anywhere in India can apply.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
